The deck includes player photography, achievement statistics, and a structured table of contents organizing the presentation into sections covering club overview, leadership, investment highlights, and appendices.

visual_style_raw: Modern, minimalist aesthetic with soft pastel gradients (blues, purples, warm tones), clean typography in sans-serif, and abstract 3D rendered imagery creating an aspirational, contemporary design tone.
content: This slide outlines a three-phase UX/UI audit methodology. It presents three abstract visual concepts: vertical ribbed textures for context understanding, soft pastel spheres for audit evaluation, and vibrant purple-to-blue gradient waves for high-fidelity mockups and workshops.

visual_style_raw: Clean, modern aesthetic with a light gray background, bold sans-serif typography, and three contrasting abstract 3D renders in dark, iridescent, and geometric styles that convey sophistication and design professionalism.
content: This slide outlines three key client expectations: Stakeholder Involvement (requiring all stakeholders to attend design reviews and provide feedback at milestones), Consolidated Feedback (clients must resolve internal conflicts before sharing unified feedback), and Time Commitment (clients should allocate 1 hour weekly for design reviews during key project phases). Each expectation is paired with a stylized 3D visual element.

visual_style_raw: Clean, professional layout with black and white typography on light background on the left; dark charcoal and navy blue dashboard interface on the right with bright accent colors (green, orange) and modern, minimalist aesthetic.
content: This slide explains the design revisions process, detailing what happens during revision phases, how revisions work best using live design tools like Figma, and the deliverables and feedback needed. It shows a dark-themed dashboard UI mockup on the right displaying analytics and data visualization elements.
